# Migao Full Context

Migao is an open-source Rust tool for recovering text typed with the wrong input method.

Repository: https://github.com/winterdrive/migao

## Product

Migao focuses on IME garbled text recovery for Traditional Chinese Bopomofo / Zhuyin. The common Windows workflow is:

1. Type text while the wrong IME is active, producing garbled key text such as `su3cl3`.
2. Select the garbled text, often with `Ctrl+A`.
3. Press `Ctrl+Alt+R`.
4. `migao-watch` replaces the selected text with the recovered Chinese text, such as `你好`.

The CLI can also recover text:

```sh
migao fix "su3cl3"
migao fix --top 3 "su3cl3"
migao list
```

## Install

Windows one-liner:

```powershell
irm https://raw.githubusercontent.com/winterdrive/migao/main/install.ps1 | iex
```

Uninstall:

```powershell
& ([scriptblock]::Create((irm https://raw.githubusercontent.com/winterdrive/migao/main/install.ps1))) -Uninstall
```

The installer downloads the latest Windows release, installs `migao.exe`, `migao-watch.exe`, and `migao.ico` under `%USERPROFILE%\.local\bin`, creates a Start Menu shortcut, optionally registers launch at login, and starts the tray app.

## Supported IMEs

| Identifier | Aliases | Layout |
|------------|---------|--------|
| `bopomofo-daqian` | `zhuyin`, `注音` | Standard Daqian Bopomofo keyboard |
| `pinyin` | `拼音` | Full pinyin QWERTY |

## Architecture

- `src/main.rs` is the CLI entry point.
- `src/lib.rs` exposes `recover()` and `recover_top_n()`.
- `src/bin/watch.rs` is the Windows tray daemon with global hotkey handling.
- `src/ime/` contains keyboard layout segmentation.
- `src/rules/` contains IME recovery rules.
- `src/viterbi.rs` ranks Chinese candidates using dictionary and bigram data.
- `data/` contains embedded dictionary inputs.
- `scripts/accuracy_gate.py` is the regression accuracy check.

## Development checks

```sh
cargo fmt --check
cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings
cargo test
python scripts/accuracy_gate.py --threshold 90
```

## Release

Tags matching `v*` trigger `.github/workflows/release.yml`.

Release assets:

- `migao-windows-x64.zip`
- `migao-macos-arm64.tar.gz`
- `migao-linux-x64.tar.gz`

## License

The project is licensed as `MIT AND Apache-2.0`.

The Apache 2.0 component covers the RIME dictionary data embedded in the binary.
